title: pr-autopilot v0.5 assignments.yaml
description: Schema for assignments.yaml — the project-level work queue consumed by /pr-autopilot:assign, /finish, etc. See docs/superpowers/specs/2026-05-28-pr-autopilot-v0.5-pre-pr-lifecycle-design.md for full reference.

version.description: Schema version. v0.5 ships with version: 1.

excludes.description: Already-shipped assignments — context only. Used for dep satisfaction by /assign.

id.description: Globally unique within project. Lowercase kebab-case. Recommended <area>-<seq>-<topic>.

branch.description: Full git branch ref. Conventional prefixes recommended.

status.description: Coarse status on main. Runtime sub-status lives in .claude/assignment-claims/<id>.json on the feature branch — NEVER 'in_progress' here.

deps.description: Other assignment IDs that must have status: merged before this is READY.

blocks.description: Informational reverse pointer — assignments that wait on this one. NOT validated by skill.

needs_decision.description: If true: status should be 'blocked' until user resolves. No auto-unblock skill in v0.5.

first_prompt.description: Multi-line kickoff prompt loaded by /assign after worktree creation.

merged_at.description: Set by /finish when status flips to merged.

merged_in_pr.description: Set by /finish when status flips to merged.
